events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at SV Darmstadt 98

headlines.description: USMNT midfielder Brenden Aaronson was sent off but that didn't stop Union Berlin from winning 4-1 win at Darmstadt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brenden Aaronson sent off in Union Berlin win

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (SV Darmstadt 98 vs. FC Union Berlin - Game Highlights) 2023/08/26 ESHEET

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund stumbled to a 1-1 draw at VfL Bochum in their mini-Ruhr valley derby on Saturday, with Donyell Malen's second-half equaliser.
headlines.shortLinkText: Malen rescues draw for Dortmund in derby clash

video.headline: Stoger's rasping finish makes it 1-0 Bochum vs. Dortmund.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Stoger's rasping finish makes it 1-0 Bochum vs. Dortmund.) 2023/08/26 ESHEET
